overall.description: A first-person perspective video game sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning with observation of a vehicle crash scene on a wet neon-lit street, then transitioning to walking through a futuristic urban downtown area and entering a narrow graffiti-covered alleyway. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with heavy neon lighting, wet reflective surfaces, and dense urban architecture.

events.description: camera begins circling around the crashed vehicles to survey the damage
camera shifts focus to the side of the silver SUV resting on the red sports car

agents.ego_description: circling the wreckage of two crashed vehicles, examining the damage from multiple angles

entered.detail: futuristic red sports car crushed under the silver SUV with damaged roof and open doors
large silver SUV wedged on top of the red car with open doors and visible damage
rain-slicked asphalt road with white lane markings reflecting neon lights
distant neon signs and building illumination creating cyberpunk atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime urban intersection where a silver SUV has crashed onto a red sports car. The camera orbits slowly around the wreckage, revealing the extent of the damage and the wet, neon-lit street environment. No pedestrians are immediately nearby, and the focus remains entirely on the vehicle collision.

events.description: moving away from the crash scene onto the main city sidewalk
continuing walk past commercial storefronts with glowing displays

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet city sidewalk away from the crash site, passing commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens and neon signs on building facades
tall modern buildings with reflective glass windows and futuristic architecture
short orange traffic bollards lining the edge of the sidewalk
large white rectangular planters with greenery separating walkway from street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the crash and walks along a wide city sidewalk lined with orange bollards and planters. Neon billboards and glass commercial buildings dominate the left side while the wet pavement reflects the colorful lights. Sparse pedestrians walk in the distance as the camera proceeds down the urban thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with security checkpoint

events.description: approaching the alley entrance where a security guard stands watch
slowing down as approaching the security guard and alley entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the alley entrance while passing other pedestrians on the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: security guard in yellow safety vest standing with arms crossed near the alley entrance

entered.detail: large painted skull artwork with red drips on the wall near the alley entrance
small guard station with desk and equipment near the alley entrance
dark opening leading into a narrow passage between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a building overhang into a semi-covered walkway, approaching a narrow alley entrance marked by a large skull mural. A security guard in a yellow vest stands watch near the entrance. The crowd density increases slightly with several pedestrians visible, and the environment transitions from open street to sheltered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: entering the narrow alleyway past the security guard
moving deeper into the darker section of the alley with green overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow graffiti-covered alleyway, passing trash and debris on the ground

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
large dark metal dumpster or storage container against the right wall
scattered litter, cardboard boxes, and debris covering the alley floor
exposed metal pipes and conduits running along the ceiling of the alley

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, enclosed alleyway passing the security guard. The walls are covered in dense graffiti and the floor is littered with trash and cardboard boxes. Overhead pipes and dim green lighting create a claustrophobic atmosphere as the camera moves deeper into the dark passage, leaving the neon-lit street behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a chaotic vehicle crash on a neon-lit street into the claustrophobic depths of a graffiti-covered alleyway. It begins by orbiting a silver SUV crashed atop a red sports car, lingering on the wreckage and the reflective wet pavement of the nighttime intersection. As the camera moves away from the collision, the scene opens onto a wide city sidewalk lined with orange bollards and towering glass buildings that cast colorful neon glows across the street. The perspective then shifts under a building overhang toward a sheltered walkway, passing a security guard stationed beside a large skull mural as the crowd density increases. Finally, the camera leaves the open urban thoroughfare behind to enter a narrow, enclosed passage where dim green lighting and walls layered in graffiti create a dark, oppressive atmosphere.
